name: Automating marketing email delivery after a Google Forms survey

interface.label: What are your top skin concerns? (Select all that apply) (C)
Which product do you use most often in your skincare routine? (D)
Which skincare ingredient do you prefer? (E)
What is the most important factor when you purchase skincare products? (F)
Enter your email if you’d like personalized recommendations and special offers. (G)

mapper.html:

designed for radiant, healthy-looking skin every day.
